scripts.verify: bun run verify:repo && bun run verify:docs && bun run typecheck && bun run test
scripts.verify:docs: find docs -type f -name '*.md' -print | sort | while read -r file; do head -n 1 "$file" | grep -qx -- '---' || echo "$file"; done > /tmp/asf-docs-missing-frontmatter.txt; test ! -s /tmp/asf-docs-missing-frontmatter.txt
scripts.persistence:health: bash -c 'docker compose --env-file .env -f infra/docker/compose.persistence.yml ps && curl -fsS http://localhost:${QDRANT_HTTP_PORT:-6333}/healthz >/dev/null && echo qdrant: ok'
scripts.persistence:reset: docker compose --env-file .env -f infra/docker/compose.persistence.yml down -v && docker compose --env-file .env -f infra/docker/compose.persistence.yml up -d
